firebase-common.author: Rodrigo Lazo
firebase-common.message:
[AppCheck] Remove reCAPTCHA site key support  (#8457)

Removed `getRecaptchaSiteKey` from `FirebaseOptions` and deprecated
`RecaptchaAppCheckProviderFactory.getInstance()` methods. Site keys must
now be provided explicitly via
`RecaptchaAppCheckProviderFactory.getInstance(String)`.

While the API existed, the support from the backend didn't. Because of
it we are marking the change as non-breaking.

Also updated `subprojects.cfg` to categorize `transport-runtime-testing`
as a test project.

firebase-firestore.author: Daniel La Rocque
firebase-firestore.message:
feat(firestore): support retrieving documents up to 16MB over gRPC (#8363)

Increases the gRPC max inbound message size to 17MB, to support 16MB
documents.

firebase-firestore.author: Rodrigo Lazo
firebase-firestore.message:
[Infra] Update Android Gradle configurations (#8417)

Migrated `adbOptions` to `installation` blocks and moved
`targetSdkVersion` to the `testOptions` block across various modules.
Also updated `subprojects.cfg` to categorize `transport-runtime-testing`
as a test project.

firebase-firestore.author: Daniel La Rocque
firebase-firestore.message:
feat(firestore): support configurable gRPC flow control window size (#8364)

Increases the default HTTP/2 flow control window size from 64 KB to 256
KB to speed up large document reads.

Because a larger window size could cause head-of-line (HoL) blocking on
poor or unstable internet connections (especially during concurrent
reads with large documents), this PR also exposes a new configuration
setting, `grpcFlowControlWindow`, on `FirebaseFirestoreSettings` and its
builder. This allows developers to customize the flow control window
size or revert back to the previous 64KB limit if they observe network
regressions.


[go/firestore-flow-control-api](http://go/firestore-flow-control-api)
(internal)

firebase-ml-modeldownloader.author: emilypgoogle
firebase-ml-modeldownloader.message:
Deprecate Firebase ML Model Downloader (#8424)

Deprecate the FirebaseMLModelDownloader library within the Firebase
Android SDK, reflecting its scheduled shutdown on June 15, 2027.

All public API symbols have been marked with `@Deprecated` and a
corresponding javadoc description.
Added a deprecation notice to the changelog.
Further steps to remove the library and prevent release are not in scope
of initial deprecation.

ai-logic/firebase-ai.author: Rodrigo Lazo
ai-logic/firebase-ai.message:
[AI] Update location docs and notes for Firebase AI (#8466)

Update documentation URLs in APIController and Exceptions to point to
the latest Firebase location guides. Refine the CHANGELOG notes
regarding default locations for GenerativeBackend backends and update
the doc comment for agentPlatform.

ai-logic/firebase-ai.author: Mila
ai-logic/firebase-ai.message: [AI] Implement RealtimeInputConfig and Manual Activity Signals for Live API (#8080)

ai-logic/firebase-ai.author: Vinay Guthal
ai-logic/firebase-ai.message:
Expose On-Device Model Name in GenerativeModel Extension (#8247)

Exposes a new getOnDeviceModelName function in OnDeviceExtension to
retrieve the name of the on-device AI model. This brings the Firebase
Android SDK closer to feature parity with ML Kit GenAI SDK's model name
retrieval capabilities (GenerativeModel.getBaseModelName()).

ai-logic/firebase-ai.author: Rodrigo Lazo
ai-logic/firebase-ai.message:
[AI] Introduce Agent Platform backend and deprecate Vertex AI  (#8437)

Added support for the Agent Platform backend with a default location of
"global". The existing `vertexAI` methods have been marked as deprecated
in favor of `agentPlatform`. Updated internal request handling, URI
construction, and service endpoints to integrate the new backend type.

Internal b/535800463

---------

Co-authored-by: Mila <107142260+milaGGL@users.noreply.github.com>

ai-logic/firebase-ai.author: Mila
ai-logic/firebase-ai.message: [Fix] capitalize Grounding with Google Maps / Search (#8408)

ai-logic/firebase-ai.author: emilypgoogle
ai-logic/firebase-ai.message:
Update testing to Gemini 3 models (#8405)

Updates AI Logic testing to use Gemini 3 models. Additionally migrates
to constants and removes testing against verifying specific model names
to futureproof for further edits.

ai-logic/firebase-ai-ondevice.author: Vinay Guthal
ai-logic/firebase-ai-ondevice.message:
Expose On-Device Model Name in GenerativeModel Extension (#8247)

Exposes a new getOnDeviceModelName function in OnDeviceExtension to
retrieve the name of the on-device AI model. This brings the Firebase
Android SDK closer to feature parity with ML Kit GenAI SDK's model name
retrieval capabilities (GenerativeModel.getBaseModelName()).

ai-logic/firebase-ai-ondevice.author: Rodrigo Lazo
ai-logic/firebase-ai-ondevice.message:
[Infra] Enable nested release notes headers (#8396)

Some libraries require their release notes to be nested further than the
rest. We're adding a mechanism to enable this
behaviour (`nestedHeader`), and updated the firebaseLibrary
configuration for `firebase-ai-*` and `firebase-appcheck-*` to set it to
true.
